title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma with CNF-dual and explicit layer-schedule infrastructure
description:
(v0.9.0) Gate B coefficient-lane and frozen-form stack S2175-S2183 under unchanged t(d,s)=S(d)*(s-1): affine headroom beat ratio_beat_affine with (16*m*w+1)*l<=p, coefficient-17 packaging, ambient 9826 (S2175); exact factor-4 (4*w)^s RCode cardinality threaded through the real consumer path, ratio_beat4, geometricSchedule16, ambient 8192 (S2176); Route A-sharp coefficient 9 packaging the exact affine fold, geometricSchedule9, ambient 1458=2*9^2*9 exact minimum, 9 = floor of the multiplicative packaging family (S2177); multi-round uniform-9 packages at 13122 and 118098 and closure of the free multiplicative coefficient lane, Route B factor-2 parked (S2179); hypothesis-free frontier count recurrence with raw<=recurrence<=size (S2180); frozen-form B4 v1 class wrapper frozenFormB4_v1_allLevels_uniform9 - for every nonempty-fanin raw formula, under a single syntax-only coarse Entry product, every depth level carries the synthesized-dedup uniform-9 final-tree payload with schedules, S, and d synthesized (S2181); strong structural non-vacuity witness twinCubeWitness9 with dedup count 2 and normalized width 2 at the unique binding level welded to levelEntryProduct9 = 23328, plus the first through-the-hypothesis wrapper instantiation at ambient 73811250 (S2182); recurrence Entry frozenFormEntryProduct9Rec never exceeding the size-coarse Entry with a same-witness strict separation at ambient 11197440 (S2183). Audit surface 1810 pinned axiom profiles. Boundary: class-level iterated collapse for the restricted nonempty-fanin normalized-view/dedup route and bounded schedule-entry arithmetic only; packaging witnesses are structural schedule non-degeneracy, not switching non-vacuity.

Prior releases retain Gate A realized-code/row-collision obstruction and no-go packaging through S2140, Gate B syntactic-terminal class envelopes through S2172, SimpleDNF switching lemma infrastructure, CNF-dual and bounded-depth bridges, PHP depth-floor rungs, and generated/refined iterated-collapse certificates. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20757627.

Non-claims: this artifact does not prove P != NP, P = NP, an NP or circuit lower bound, a Frege/PHP lower bound, arbitrary AC0 or bounded-depth collapse, a PHP switching lemma (Gate A rung 4 remains open), or closure of full frozen-payload B4 beyond the named nonempty-fanin normalized-view/dedup class.
